gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED: load_gate_file missing validate_gate_file — deserialized gate files not fully validated on load; added validate_gate_file(data) after schema version check

[ultrathink] FIXED: gate_id path traversal — persist_evidence_record, load_evidence_bundle, persist_gate_file, load_gate_file all used gate_id directly in path construction without sanitization; added _validate_gate_id helper rejecting /, \, ..
[ultrathink] FIXED: Missing LLM evidence migration test — evidence_migrate passthrough not tested with confidence/rationale fields; added test_llm_evidence_preserves_confidence_and_rationale
[ultrathink] FIXED: canonical_json import inconsistency — Task 5 used lazy import inside function body, Task 6 imported at top level; moved to top-level import in Task 4 scaffold
[ultrathink] MINOR: evidence_filename sanitizes / and \ but not other OS-problematic chars (spaces, colons) — acceptable since gate categories/collectors use simple ASCII names
[ultrathink] MINOR: write_gate_marker accepts empty gate_id/commit_sha without validation — low risk since marker is internal orchestrator state, not user input
[ultrathink] MINOR: test file imports grow incrementally across tasks without showing consolidated final import block — implementer will naturally consolidate
[ultrathink] DEFERRED: audit log hash-chaining — milestone description mentions it but actual audit.jsonl integration belongs to adjudication-m9 / integration-m10 which own the audit write path
